  "tier_rationale": "No retrieved primary study materially links STAT4 to TCR signalling inhibition or a closely related inhibitory T cell phenotype. STAT4-focused papers are non-immune (follicular, cardiac), chemistry, associative genetics, or a review, none testing TCR/inhibitory T cell function. The papers addressing TCR-mediated inhibition (PMC2195871, PMC2195684) or T cell phenotypes (PMC10849914, PMC2196089, PMC7178138) implicate STAT3/STAT5/STAT6 or SOCS3 rather than STAT4 as the causal regulator. Therefore no candidate-specific evidence supports weak-or-higher tiers.",

parsed.tier_rationale: No retrieved primary study materially links STAT4 to TCR signalling inhibition or a closely related inhibitory T cell phenotype. STAT4-focused papers are non-immune (follicular, cardiac), chemistry, associative genetics, or a review, none testing TCR/inhibitory T cell function. The papers addressing TCR-mediated inhibition (PMC2195871, PMC2195684) or T cell phenotypes (PMC10849914, PMC2196089, PMC7178138) implicate STAT3/STAT5/STAT6 or SOCS3 rather than STAT4 as the causal regulator. Therefore no candidate-specific evidence supports weak-or-higher tiers.
